Uses of Interface
me.kevinboone.jgemini.base.DownloadTarget

Packages that use DownloadTarget
Package
Description
me.kevinboone.jgemini.base
This package contains the interfaces that define the JGemini classes, along with some fundamental utilities for SSL, configuration management, and Filename processing.
me.kevinboone.jgemini.swing
The Swing user interface for JGemini.

  • Uses of DownloadTarget in me.kevinboone.jgemini.base

    Classes in me.kevinboone.jgemini.base that implement DownloadTarget
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ApplicationDownloadTarget
    A DownloadTarget for use with SwingFileDownload (and possibly others in due course), that sends data to an external media player.
    class 
    FileDownloadTarget
    A DownloadTarget that represents a local file.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    DownloadTarget
    Download.getTarget()
    Get the target object, which might represent a local file or a stream player, among others.
